steps.title: Identify what the passage conclusion requires as support
steps.content: The team concluded that exposure amount influences distinction ability. A finding supporting this must show that dogs with more exposure have a stronger ability to distinguish their familiar language from unfamiliar ones.

steps.title: Locate the finding that demonstrates this relationship
steps.content:
Choice B directly supports the conclusion: older dogs (more exposure) show the greatest difference in brain activity between familiar and unfamiliar languages, meaning more exposure correlates with stronger discrimination ability. Choices A, C, and D either lack an exposure-ability connection, address different language comparisons, or both.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
